title: Cloud Guard Problem: Policy Too Permissive
description: Detects Cloud Guard reporting problem: Policy_Too_Permissive.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Problems' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Cloud Guard Logs') and (('Problem Name' = 'Policy_Too_Permissive'))
